title: All We Know

lyrics.text: Fighting flames of fire
lyrics.translation: 宛若在烈焰中苦苦挣扎

lyrics.text: Hang onto burning wires
lyrics.translation: 倔强将火中之栗在手中紧握

lyrics.text: We don't care anymore
lyrics.translation: 不在意伤痕痛苦的你我

lyrics.text: Are we fading lovers?
lyrics.translation: 我们是否已经走到尽头

lyrics.text: We keep wasting colors
lyrics.translation: 再多挣扎也只是徒增苦愁

lyrics.text: Maybe we should let this go
lyrics.translation: 也许是时候该放手

lyrics.text: We're falling apart, still we hold together
lyrics.translation: 渐行渐远的你我 依然将双手紧握

lyrics.text: We've passed the end so we chase forever
lyrics.translation: 相信挺过这难关 爱或许就能永久

lyrics.text: Cause this is all we know
lyrics.translation: 这就是我们为何而坚守

lyrics.text: This feeling's all we know
lyrics.translation: 这就是我们共同拥有的感受

lyrics.text: I'll ride my bike up to the road
lyrics.translation: 骑着单车的我 欲将这世界环游

lyrics.text: Down the streets right through the city
lyrics.translation: 横穿这城市 在转角的街头直走

lyrics.text: I'll go everywhere you go
lyrics.translation: 无论你到哪 我都跟着你走

lyrics.text: From Chicago to the coast
lyrics.translation: 哪怕是从芝加哥到西海岸的尽头

lyrics.text: You tell me, "Hit this and let's go
lyrics.translation: 想起你对我说过 决定了就即刻行动

lyrics.text: Blow the smoke right through the window"
lyrics.translation: 想起在车窗前吞云吐雾那般自在的时候

lyrics.text: Cause this is all we know
lyrics.translation: 这就是我们共同的拥有

lyrics.text: Cause this is all we know
lyrics.translation: 这也是我们都记得的感受

lyrics.text: Cause this is all we know
lyrics.translation: 我们都记得 都认同 都共同拥有

lyrics.text: Never face each other
lyrics.translation: 不再见面的你我

lyrics.text: one bed, different covers
lyrics.translation: 心还连着 但眼前风景却早已不同

lyrics.text: We don't care anymore
lyrics.translation: 也不能再像从前那般关怀问候

lyrics.text: Two hearts still beating
lyrics.translation: 两颗心依旧为彼此跳动

lyrics.text: On with different rhythms
lyrics.translation: 却渐渐不再是相同的频率和节奏

lyrics.text: Maybe we should let this go
lyrics.translation: 也许真的是时候该放手

lyrics.text: We're falling apart, still we hold together
lyrics.translation: 渐行渐远的你我 依然在为彼此坚守

lyrics.text: We've passed the end so we chase forever
lyrics.translation: 相信挺过这难关 爱或许就能永久

lyrics.text: Cause this is all we know
lyrics.translation: 这就是我们为何而坚守

lyrics.text: This feeling's all we know
lyrics.translation: 这就是我们共同拥有的感受

lyrics.text: I'll ride my bike up to the road
lyrics.translation: 骑着单车的我 欲将这世界环游

lyrics.text: Down the streets right through the city
lyrics.translation: 横穿这城市 在转角的街头直走

lyrics.text: I'll go everywhere you go
lyrics.translation: 无论你到哪 我都跟着你走

lyrics.text: From Chicago to the coast
lyrics.translation: 哪怕是从芝加哥到西海岸的尽头

lyrics.text: You tell me, "Hit this and let's go
lyrics.translation: 想起你对我说过 决定了就即刻行动

lyrics.text: Blow the smoke right through the window"
lyrics.translation: 想起在车窗前吞云吐雾那般自在的时候

lyrics.text: Cause this is all we know
lyrics.translation: 这就是我们共同的拥有

lyrics.text: Cause this is all we know
lyrics.translation: 这也是我们都记得的感受

lyrics.text: Cause this is all we know
lyrics.translation: 我们都记得 都认同 都共同拥有
